issue_summary: Make AbstractFuture.cancel/done and ListenableFutureTask constructors visible and @Deprecated.
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Creates a {@code ListenableFutureTask} that will upon running, execute the
   * given {@code Callable}.
   *
   * @param callable the callable task
   */
javadoc_after: /** * Deprecated. Use {@link #create(Callable)} instead. This method will be * removed in Guava release 11. * * Creates a {@code ListenableFutureTask} that will upon running, execute the * given {@code Callable}. * * @param callable the callable task */
